lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Cutter ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Cutter
sources.what: Ship reference page: stat block, cargo capacity, module slot layout, sell locations.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Cutter ship article: role profile, Gutamaya manufacture, Duke rank requirement.

sources.label: YouTube — TheYamiks
sources.what: Opinionated review of the Imperial Cutter, covering its large cargo capacity and heavy shielding as a defensible hauler.
